description: A high-performance dark-themed template designed for AI agencies to showcase intelligent workflows, automation services, and tool integrations.
long_description:
## AI Agency Landing Page Template

This is a premium, **brand-forward landing page template** specifically crafted for AI automation agencies and technical service providers. It features a sophisticated **dark mode aesthetic** with futuristic UI elements and subtle animations to build trust with modern founders and technical teams.

### Key Features
- **Interactive Visualizations:** Includes CSS-animated 'noodles' and SVG-based data flow diagrams to illustrate complex AI processes.
- **Modern Stack Elements:** Pre-built sections for tool integrations (Slack, Stripe, HubSpot) and intelligent workflow logic.
- **Conversion Focused:** Prominent CTA buttons for booking audits and clear value propositions for lead qualification and support agents.
- **Expert Showcases:** A specialized section to highlight agency work and case studies with a sleek browser-style mockup.

### Primary Use Case
Perfect for agencies selling **custom AI agent builds**, workflow optimization, and digital transformation services looking for a high-end, futuristic web presence.
